name: Rakesh Bodh
text: One of the best school in Kullu city. The quality of education and the dedication of teachers is unmatched. Highly recommend Kids Planet for any parent looking for a good school in Kullu Valley.

name: Jyoti Thakur
text: My daughter has been at Kids Planet since Playgroup. The transformation in her confidence is incredible — she went from a shy toddler to leading her class in recitation. The teachers truly care about every child.

name: Rajesh Sharma
text: Both my children study at Kids Planet. The personal attention each child receives is remarkable. Mrs. Parmar knows every student by name and follows their progress closely. You won't find this at any other school in Kullu.

name: Sunita Devi
text: Best preschool in Kullu for young children. Clean classrooms, well-maintained campus, and the location in Dhalpur is very convenient. My son looks forward to going to school every single day.

name: Meenakshi Thakur
text: I was looking for a school that balances academics with activities. Kids Planet delivers on both — my daughter excels in her studies and has won prizes in art competitions and sports day events.

name: Preet Verma
text: The play-based learning approach in the preschool section is wonderful. My child has learned so much through activities, art, and storytelling. The teachers make every day exciting for the little ones.
